title: cephalaria humilis
intro: Cephalaria humilis, also known as the small button-flowered cephalaria, is a flowering plant species in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of southeastern Europe and southwestern Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cephalaria humilis include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and pain, and herbal preparations often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers.
